mapper.select:
SELECT sm.stock_code AS stockCode, sm.name AS name, stm.name AS categoryName, CASE WHEN sd.staff_no IS NOT NULL AND sd.return_date IS NULL THEN '貸出中' ELSE '在庫' END AS statusName, CASE WHEN sm.ownership_type = 1 THEN '会社保有' WHEN sm.ownership_type = 2 THEN 'リース品' ELSE '' END AS ownershipTypeName FROM stock_master sm INNER JOIN stock_type_master stm ON sm.stock_type = stm.stock_type LEFT JOIN stock_data sd ON sm.stock_code = sd.stock_code AND sd.return_date IS NULL AND sd.del = false
sm.del = false
AND sm.stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{stockCode}, '%')
AND sm.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND sm.stock_type = #{stockType}
AND sd.staff_no IS NOT NULL
AND sd.staff_no IS NULL
AND sm.ownership_type = #{ownershipType}
ORDER BY sm.stock_code
